nodes.title: Login User
nodes.description: POST /api/auth/login with {username, password}. Validates credentials against database. Returns {token, user: {id, username, fullName}} on success. Returns 401 with {error: 'اسم المستخدم أو كلمة المرور غير صحيحة'} on failure.

nodes.title: Register User
nodes.description: POST /api/auth/register with {username, password, fullName}. Hashes password with bcrypt, inserts user record. Returns {id, username, fullName} on success. Returns 400 with {error: 'اسم المستخدم مستخدم بالفعل'} if username exists.

nodes.title: Fetch Current User
nodes.description: GET /api/auth/me with Authorization Bearer token. Decodes JWT and returns {userId, username, fullName}. Returns 401 with {error: 'غير مصرح'} if token invalid or missing.
